items.title: When a file is downloaded in a specific folder , It should be emailed to me
items.text_excerpt: So I am facing this problem where I have to download hundreds of files from Windchill, that are stored in a common drive folder on our server, so that everyone can access it. Then I have to copy and Paste that same file to email and send it off. Is there any way to automate this process, as in whene…
items.summary_ru: Необходимо автоматизировать отправку загруженных файлов на email.

items.title: Automating Git & SSH workflow
items.text_excerpt: I'm working on a programming project with a few team members, using Git for version control. Every hour I have to deploy a live version of our repository for others to preview. This involves the following commands: ssh me@mywebsite.com cd /path/to/my/preview git checkout develop git pull As you can …
items.summary_ru: Требуется автоматизация процесса развертывания проекта с использованием Git.

items.title: GSheets- Automate reminder e-mail to client 1-2 days prior to appointment
items.text_excerpt: I'm looking for a way (google app script, add-on, or otherwise) that will automate an appointment reminder e-mail using cell values in my google spreadsheet. Currently, my work flow is like this: I fill out my client ID and appointment date google form. Mail merge sends a confirmation e-mail to clie…
items.summary_ru: Необходимо автоматизировать отправку напоминаний о встречах по электронной почте.

items.title: Searching for a pipeline/workflow software
items.text_excerpt: I am currently looking for a free pipeline/workflow software that can help me with the following task. items.summary_ru: Ищу программное обеспечение для автоматизации рабочего процесса с несколькими шагами.
